CHECK_YN_3380000 , A.CHECK_YN_3390000 AS CHECK_YN_3390000 , A.CHECK_YN_3400000 AS CHECK_YN_3400000 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP002' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_DETL_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, NULL, '', '00000', '', SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4)) ||' ' || NVL((SELECT Z.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS TE_MNG_MOK_NM , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID), 0) AS CHILD_CNT , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG SEPARATOR ', ') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM TB_PLEDGE Z1 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z2 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z3 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z4 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z3.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z2.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z1.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) , '') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '000' || '_' || BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3250000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3250000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3260000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3260000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3270000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3270000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3280000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3280000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3290000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3290000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3300000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3300000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3310000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3310000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3320000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3320000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3330000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3330000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3340000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3340000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3350000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3350000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3360000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3360000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3370000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3370000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3380000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3380000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3390000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3390000 , NVL(I.CHECK_YN_3400000, 'N') AS CHECK_YN_3400000 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E , VW_REPORT020_D I WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND I.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND I.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND I.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND I.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND I.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2')) AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1'
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_REPORT B ON B.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND B.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020PageListCnt*/ SELECT COUNT(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS CNT FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2')) AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.DEPT_CD , E.REPORT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD ) A

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020PageList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , T.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , T.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , T.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , T.REPORT_MSTR AS REPORT_MSTR , T.INDI_ATTR , T.GOV_SUB , T.ADVNC_PROC , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.DEPT_CD , E.REPORT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD ) A ) K WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND I.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND I.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND I.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND I.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = I.REPORT_CD AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = I.REPORT_DETL_CD AND E.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND E.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.FIS_YEAR = K.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = K.BGT_DGR AND A.DEPT_CD = K.DEPT_CD AND A.DBIZ_CD = K.DBIZ_CD AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = K.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND K.ROW_NUM BETWEEN NVL(#start#, 0) AND NVL(#rowNum#, 0) + NVL(#start#, 0) -1
) A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_REPORT B ON B.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND B.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN LPAD(NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0), 3, '0') || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '000_0000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020TotList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , T.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , T.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.DMN_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , T.PLEDGE_FGS AS PLEDGE_FGS , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.REPORT_DETL_NM ELSE '' END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS PARENT , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS IS_LEAF , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , T.DGR_LEVEL AS "LEVEL" FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT2 + A.FRSC_AMT3 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 + A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.CHAR_AMT1 AS CHAR_AMT1 , A.CHAR_AMT2 AS CHAR_AMT2 , A.CHAR_AMT3 AS CHAR_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT1 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT2 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT3 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP002' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_DETL_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG SEPARATOR ', ') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM TB_PLEDGE Z1 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z2 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z3 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z4 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z3.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z2.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z1.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) , '') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD ) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , H.CT - 1 AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_CD) AS REPORT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '000')

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020ExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , CAST(T.OFFICE_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS OFFICE_CNT , T.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.REPORT_FG_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 2 THEN T.REPORT_FG_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , NVL(T.EXAM_CONT, '') AS EXAM_CONT , NVL(T.DEMAND_CONT, '') AS DEMAND_CONT , NVL(T.REFLECT_FG_NM, '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL(T.INVEST_PLAN, '') AS INVEST_PLAN , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.DMN_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.DMN_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , T.PLEDGE_FGS AS PLEDGE_FGS , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 2 AND LENGTH(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) > 4 THEN SUBSTR(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4, 2) ELSE '' END AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , A.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.INVEST_PLAN AS INVEST_PLAN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 4) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0' || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND ((A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' AND A.OFFICE_CNT > 0) OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_FG, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020ExcelListTot*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , CAST(T.OFFICE_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS OFFICE_CNT , T.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , NVL(T.EXAM_CONT, '') AS EXAM_CONT , NVL(T.DEMAND_CONT, '') AS DEMAND_CONT , NVL(T.REFLECT_FG_NM, '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL(T.INVEST_PLAN, '') AS INVEST_PLAN , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , 2) ELSE '' END AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT2 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT3 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP003' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REFLECT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP004' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REPORT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG SEPARATOR ', ') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM TB_PLEDGE Z1 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z2 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z3 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z4 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z3.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) , '') AS PLEDGE_FGS , A.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , SUM(CASE WHEN H.CT = 1 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# = 'Y' AND A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN H.CT = 1 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS OFFICE_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_FG , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.REFLECT_FG) AS REFLECT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.DEMAND_CONT) AS DEMAND_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.SRCH_VAL, '')) AS SRCH_VAL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.INVEST_PLAN) AS INVEST_PLAN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND ((A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' AND A.OFFICE_CNT > 0) OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') ELSE '0000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020ExcelList2*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , CAST(T.OFFICE_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS OFFICE_CNT , T.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.REPORT_FG_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 2 THEN T.REPORT_FG_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , NVL(T.EXAM_CONT, '') AS EXAM_CONT , NVL(T.DEMAND_CONT, '') AS DEMAND_CONT , NVL(T.REFLECT_FG_NM, '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL(T.INVEST_PLAN, '') AS 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , T.PLEDGE_FGS AS PLEDGE_FGS , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 2 AND LENGTH(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) > 4 THEN SUBSTR(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4, 2) ELSE '' END AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , A.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.INVEST_PLAN AS INVEST_PLAN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT2 + A.FRSC_AMT3 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 + A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.CHAR_AMT1 AS CHAR_AMT1 , A.CHAR_AMT2 AS CHAR_AMT2 , A.CHAR_AMT3 AS CHAR_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT1 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT2 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT3 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP003' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REFLECT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP008' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REPORT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG SEPARATOR ', ') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM TB_PLEDGE Z1 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z2 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z3 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z4 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z3.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z2.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z1.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) , '') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000') || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', 2, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 2, 2 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , SUM(CASE WHEN H.CT = 1 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# = 'Y' AND A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN H.CT = 1 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# != 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN H.CT = 2 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# = 'Y' AND A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN H.CT = 2 AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS OFFICE_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000' , DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000')) AS REPORT_FG , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.REFLECT_FG) AS REFLECT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.DEMAND_CONT) AS DEMAND_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.SRCH_VAL, '')) AS SRCH_VAL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.INVEST_PLAN) AS INVEST_PLAN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4,
