= A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', '1000', '022', '1000', '024', '1000', '025', '1000', '028', '3000', '2000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND ((A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' AND A.OFFICE_CNT > 0) OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_FG, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020RptTotList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , T.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '총 괄' ELSE NVL(T.REPORT_FG_NM, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_CHAR_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3 AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.CHAR_AMT1 AS CHAR_AMT1 , A.CHAR_AMT2 AS CHAR_AMT2 , A.CHAR_AMT3 AS CHAR_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT1 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT2 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , A.DMN_CHAR_AMT3 AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP004' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REPORT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_FG_NM FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0' || '_' || '000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || '000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' ) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0' || '_' || '000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || '000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.REPORT_FG, '000')

/*ReportWrite020.selectReport020OfficeList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , CAST(T.OFFICE_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS OFFICE_CNT , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합 계' ELSE NVL(T.OFFICE_NM, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT2 + A.FRSC_AMT3 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 + A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1) AS DGR_LEVEL , SUM(CASE WHEN A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# = 'Y' AND A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND #mayorReportYn# != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS OFFICE_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', 2, A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT1)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT2)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_CHAR_AMT3)) AS TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3)) AS PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.CHAR_AMT1, 0), A.CHAR_AMT1)) AS CHAR_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.CHAR_AMT2, 0), A.CHAR_AMT2)) AS CHAR_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.CHAR_AMT3, 0), A.CHAR_AMT3)) AS CHAR_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' ) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000')

/*ReportWrite020.selectReportOfficeSi022List*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , CAST(T.OFFICE_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS OFFICE_CNT , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합 계' ELSE NVL(T.OFFICE_NM, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.NATN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS NATN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.SI_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS SI_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.RD_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS RD_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.NATN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.NATN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.NATN_FRSC_AMT5 AS NATN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.SI_FRSC_AMT1 + A.SI_FRSC_AMT4 + A.SI_FRSC_AMT5 AS SI_FRSC_AMT0 , A.SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS SI_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.RD_FRSC_AMT1 + A.RD_FRSC_AMT4 + A.RD_FRSC_AMT5 AS RD_FRSC_AMT0 , A.RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS RD_DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1) AS DGR_LEVEL , SUM(CASE WHEN A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND 'N' = 'Y' AND A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND 'N' != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS OFFICE_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', 2, A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', A.FRSC_AMT1, '022', A.FRSC_AMT1, '023', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), 0), DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', A.FRSC_AMT1, '022', A.FRSC_AMT1, '023', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS NATN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', A.FRSC_AMT4, '022', A.FRSC_AMT4, '023', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), 0), DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', A.FRSC_AMT4, '022', A.FRSC_AMT4, '023', '022', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, '023', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS NATN_DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '021', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5, '022', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5, = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '010', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '020', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD <> '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' ) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000')

TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.FIS_FG_MST_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.FIS_FG_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , CAST(T.FIS_FG_MST_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS FIS_FG_MST_CNT , CAST(T.FIS_FG_CNT AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS FIS_FG_CNT , NVL(T.EXAM_CONT, '') AS EXAM_CONT , NVL(T.DEMAND_CONT, '') AS DEMAND_CONT , NVL(T.REFLECT_FG_NM, '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL(#mayorReportYn#, 'N') AS WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR
