AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(BB.CHAR_FG_CD, '090', BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR BB WHERE BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT3 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = '020' AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.FIS_FG_MST_CD || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.FIS_FG_MST_CD || '_' || A.FIS_FG_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.FIS_FG_MST_CD || '_' || A.FIS_FG_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.FIS_FG_MST_CD, '000') , NVL(T.FIS_FG_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReportBizExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_MST_FG AS FIS_MST_FG , T.FIS_FG_CD AS FIS_FG_CD , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.FIS_MST_FG_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN DECODE(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', T.FIS_FG_NM, T.OFFICE_NM) ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , NVL(#mayorReportYn#, 'N') AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN_PARAM , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT_SUM , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT_SUM , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT_SUM/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT_SUM , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP002' AND Z.DETL_CD = T.REPORT_DETL_CD), '') AS REPORT_DETL_NM FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.FIS_MST_FG AS FIS_MST_FG , A.FIS_FG_CD AS FIS_FG_CD , A.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM AS TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.FRSC_AMT_SUM AS FRSC_AMT_SUM , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM AS DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT_SUM , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT_SUM , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_MST_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_MST_CD = A.FIS_MST_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS FIS_MST_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_CD = A.FIS_FG_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS FIS_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 1 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END AS FIS_MST_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000' , 2, '0000' , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', 2, DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', REPORT_DETL_CD, '000'), REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', 2, DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', '0000', A.OFFICE_CD), A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', A.FIS_FG_CD, '000')) AS FIS_FG_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.SRCH_VAL) AS SRCH_VAL , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), A.FRSC_AMT_SUM)) AS FRSC_AMT_SUM , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT3)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT6)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , E.REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD , E.REFLECT_FG , E.DEMAND_CONT , E.EXAM_CONT , E.SRCH_VAL , E.REPORT_SORT_SEQ , E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + E.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + E.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + E.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + E.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + E.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT_SUM , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 + E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 + E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT_SUM , D.FIS_FG_MST_CD , D.FIS_FG_CD , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND CC.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('110', '120', '130', '140', '160', '180', '190', '210')) AS FRSC_AMT_SUM , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND CC.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('110', '120', '130', '140', '160', '180', '190', '210')) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT_SUM , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.FIS_MST_FG, '000') , NVL(T.FIS_FG_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_FG, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReportBizExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_MST_FG AS FIS_MST_FG , T.FIS_FG_CD AS FIS_FG_CD , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.FIS_MST_FG_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN DECODE(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', T.FIS_FG_NM, T.OFFICE_NM) ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , NVL(#mayorReportYn#, 'N') AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN_PARAM , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP002' AND Z.DETL_CD = T.REPORT_DETL_CD), '') AS REPORT_DETL_NM FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.FIS_MST_FG AS FIS_MST_FG , A.FIS_FG_CD AS FIS_FG_CD , A.REPORT_FG AS REPORT_FG , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_MST_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_MST_CD = A.FIS_MST_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS FIS_MST_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_CD = A.FIS_FG_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS FIS_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 1 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END AS FIS_MST_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000' , 2, '0000' , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', 2, DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', REPORT_DETL_CD, '000'), REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', 2, DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', '0000', A.OFFICE_CD), A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', DECODE(A.REPORT_DETL_CD, '027', A.FIS_FG_CD, '000')) AS FIS_FG_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , E.REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD , E.REFLECT_FG , E.DEMAND_CONT , E.EXAM_CONT , E.SRCH_VAL , E.REPORT_SORT_SEQ , E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , D.FIS_FG_MST_CD , D.FIS_FG_CD , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN '200' ELSE '100' END || '_' || CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '027' THEN A.FIS_FG_CD ELSE A.OFFICE_CD END || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.FIS_MST_FG, '000') , NVL(T.FIS_FG_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') ELSE '0000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) ELSE 0 END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') ELSE '0000000000000000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReportGugunTotExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '' ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT140/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT140 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 , T.REPORT_FG_NM AS REPORT_FG_NM , T.LOC_GOV_NMS AS LOC_GOV_NMS , T.OFFICE_NM AS OFFICE_NM FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT140 AS FRSC_AMT140 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(Z.DETL_CD_NM, 1, LENGTH(Z.DETL_CD_NM) - 6) FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP004' AND Z.DETL_CD = (CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '000' THEN '' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z2.LOC_GOV_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z1 , TB_LOCALGOV Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.LOCAL_GOV_CD = Z1.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND Z2.UP_LOCAL_GOV_CD = '6260000' AND Z1.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.CHECK_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY Z2.LINE_UP_NO ) , '') AS LOC_GOV_NMS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_CD) AS REPORT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , E.REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD , E.REFLECT_FG , E.DEMAND_CONT , E.EXAM_CONT , E.SRCH_VAL , E.REPORT_SORT_SEQ , E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END

/*ReportWrite020.selectReportGugunExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.LOC_GOV_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT140/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT140 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 , T.REPORT_FG_NM AS REPORT_FG_NM , T.LOC_GOV_NMS AS LOC_GOV_NMS , T.OFFICE_NM AS OFFICE_NM FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AS LOCAL_GOV_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT140 AS FRSC_AMT140 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 , NVL((SELECT Z.LOC_GOV_NM FROM TB_LOCALGOV Z WHERE Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS LOC_GOV_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.LINE_UP_NO FROM TB_LOCALGOV Z WHERE Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS LOC_GOV_RANK , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(Z.DETL_CD_NM, 1, LENGTH(Z.DETL_CD_NM) - 6) FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP004' AND Z.DETL_CD = (CASE WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '000' THEN '' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD = '028' THEN '3' WHEN A.REPORT_DETL_CD > '023' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END || A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REPORT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z2.LOC_GOV_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z1 , TB_LOCALGOV Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.LOCAL_GOV_CD = Z1.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND Z2.UP_LOCAL_GOV_CD = '6260000' AND Z1.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.CHECK_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY Z2.LINE_UP_NO ) , '') AS LOC_GOV_NMS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AS LOCAL_GOV_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_CD) AS REPORT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '000', A.REPORT_DETL_CD) AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.REPORT_SORT_SEQ) AS REPORT_SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'Y', A.CHECK_YN) AS CHECK_YN , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.FRSC_AMT140, 0))) AS FRSC_AMT140 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT3, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT6, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, DECODE(A.CHECK_YN, 'Y', A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140, 0))) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , E.REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD , E.REFLECT_FG , E.DEMAND_CONT , E.EXAM_CONT , E.SRCH_VAL , E.REPORT_SORT_SEQ , E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , E.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , G.LOCAL_GOV_CD , G.CHECK_YN , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT140 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT140 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 E , TB_REPORT020_D G WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD
AND C.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND G.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND G.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND G.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND G.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND G.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND G.CHECK_YN = 'Y' AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE 1=1 AND FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ADVNC_PROC LIKE '%' || #advncProc# || '%') > 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' OR E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = E.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = E.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd# AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' )
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CHECK_YN = 'Y'
AND (A.COMPO_LEVEL = '0' OR A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y')
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.LOC_GOV_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.LOCAL_GOV_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.REPORT_DETL_CD, '000') , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) || '_' || NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') || '_' || NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') ELSE '0_0000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_0_0000000000000000_00000' END , CASE WHEN NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') = '' THEN NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0) ELSE CAST(NVL(T.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, '') AS NUMERIC(19, 0) ) END
sqlMap.update: /*ReportWrite020.updateReport020*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT020 SET REFLECT_FG = #reflectFg# , DEMAND_CONT = #demandCont# , EXAM_CONT = #examCont# , REPORT_SORT_SEQ = NVL(#reportSortSeq#, '') , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#totFrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#totFrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#totFrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#totFrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#totFrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#totFrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_CHAR_AMT1 = NVL(#totCharAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_CHAR_AMT2 = NVL(#totCharAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_CHAR_AMT3 = NVL(#totCharAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#preInvFrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 = NVL(#preInvCharAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 = NVL(#preInvCharAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 = NVL(#preInvCharAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , MAYOR_REPORT_YN = NVL(#mayorReportYn#, '') , INVEST_PLAN = NVL(#investPlan#, '') , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*ReportWrite020.updateReport020D*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT020_D SET CHECK_YN = #checkYn# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND LOCAL_GOV_CD = #localGovCd#
